name: Project Management
description: Adds task / project / milestone frontmatter schemas, common section filters (Active Projects, My Tasks, Roadmap), and palette actions for fast task CRUD.

paletteActions.label: New Task
paletteActions.description: Create a task page with required frontmatter pre-filled.

paletteActions.label: New Project
paletteActions.description: Create a project page with required frontmatter pre-filled.

paletteActions.label: Move Task to Status…
paletteActions.description: Update the current page's `status` frontmatter via a sub-prompt.
